audit_items.proof_trace: The linear decay formula `start - (start - end) * elapsed / duration` is correctly implemented. All preconditions are enforced at config time: `auctionDuration > 0` (L647), `endingPriceMultiplier <= startingPriceMultiplier` (L653), and `elapsedTime` is explicitly capped to `auctionDuration` (L785). Floor-division via `mulDiv` never over-subtracts, so `priceMultiplier >= endingPriceMultiplier` is invariant throughout the auction lifecycle.
